This is a really good fan game I hope the best for this game and gonna be playing it a lot I do have some ideas if you wanna hear them and if you need a moderator I would be great and I’m not gonna sit there and lie about why is should be one straight up I can post about the game and get more people to play it but if you made it this far thank you for your time.
